name: quiz-clash
description: Real-time team quiz battle: Red vs Blue, 2-10 players

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
